short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $12.39B in FY2026 Q1, +24.7% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $10.30B (-16.9% vs current Q) — set by 27 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $1.50.
Next earnings: 2026-07-21 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $48B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $42B → FY2 $47B (+11.9% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 15.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +22.9% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Industrials): Reshoring + defense supercycle drives a multi-year backlog conversion story.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 61.1% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.42 — call-heavy positioning (consensus bullish).
30-day implied move: ±9.0% ($259.94 – $311.18) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -22.48pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $310.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE call vertical: short $300 / long $314 (5% OTM short, 10% OTM long). High IV in downtrend → bearish credit spread with defined risk.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 37.4% across 7 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 7 dates spanning 98–616 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±19.8% ($229.14 – $341.98).
217-day implied move: ±28.8% ($203.41 – $367.71) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $230 (-19.5% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-23.6pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Long 6-month put at $286 strike (ATM). High IV (61%) is expensive but downtrend justifies hedging; protects portfolio if cycle deteriorates further. Roll quarterly to maintain protection.
